arts.ttl: Barcelona possible starting XI against Getafe today in LaLiga
arts.sum: The surprising starting eleven that Hansi Flick fielded last Sunday against Villarreal (1-5) makes predicting Barça’s lineup for tonight’s match against Getafe ( watch at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT. This will be the first official match of the season for the Alicante-born goalkeeper, marking a pivotal opportunity in his career, as a strong start and a solid season as a starter could cement his place in the squad .

arts.ttl: Szczesny’s Barcelona move: A win-win for the player and Juventus
arts.sum: Wojciech Szczesny’s potential move to Barcelona has emerged as a surprising development following Marc-André ter Stegen’s serious injury. The former Juventus goalkeeper, who had previously announced his retirement, is now set to make a comeback to top-level football. This unexpected turn of events is poised to benefit both Szczesny and his former club, Juventus. Calciomercato report how the Polish goalkeeper’s decision to join Barcelona will likely bring a smile to Juventus’ financial department. When Szczesny and Juventus agreed to terminate his contract on August 14, which was originally set to expire on June 30, 2025, they negotiated a severance package The post Szczesny’s Barcelona move: A win-win for the player and Juventus appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.sum: 19-year-old Guillaume Restes is reportedly 'under consideration' as a replacement for Ter Stegen during the January transfer window. Club captain and starting goalkeeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen was stretched off on the stroke of half-time with what has now been confirmed to be a season-ending knee injury.
